name: Gallente Election Y128 SKINs Crate
description:
Includes one randomly selected SKIN: Exoplanets Hunter, Chromodynamic Candy, Luminaire Zenith, Industrial Livery, Hunter's Quiver, Inner Zone Shipping, Quafe Green Apple, or Green Demons.

All SKINs in this crate apply to Gallente hulls, except the Industrial Livery SKINs, which apply to industrial ships.
